mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM NMCP_NEWS_DATA_BAS WHERE STAT_VAL = 'Y' AND ( (ST_DT IS NOT NULL AND ED_DT IS NOT NULL AND ST_DT <= SYSDATE AND ED_DT >= TRUNC(SYSDATE)) OR (ST_DT IS NULL OR ED_DT IS NULL) )

SELECT ROWNUM, NEWS_DAT_SEQ, NEWS_DAT_SUBJECT, STAT_VAL, NEWS_DAT_IMG, IMG_DESC, NEWS_LINE_SBST, NEWS_DAT_SBST, NEWS_DAT_HIT_CNT, LINK_URL_ADR, NOTI_YN, CRET_ID, AMD_ID, CRET_DT, AMD_DT, LINK_TARGET, NOTI_IMG_PATH, NOTI_IMG_DESC FROM NMCP_NEWS_DATA_BAS WHERE STAT_VAL = 'Y' AND NOTI_YN = 'Y' AND ROWNUM < 6 ORDER BY NOTI_YN DESC, CRET_DT DESC

SELECT NEWS_DAT_SEQ, NEWS_DAT_SUBJECT, NEWS_DAT_SBST, STAT_VAL, NEWS_DAT_IMG, NEWS_DAT_SBST, IMG_DESC, NEWS_LINE_SBST, NEWS_DAT_HIT_CNT, LINK_URL_ADR, CRET_DT, LINK_TARGET, UP_DT, ST_DT, ED_DT FROM NMCP_NEWS_DATA_BAS WHERE STAT_VAL = 'Y' AND ( (ST_DT IS NOT NULL AND ED_DT IS NOT NULL AND ST_DT <= SYSDATE AND ED_DT >= TRUNC(SYSDATE)) OR (ST_DT IS NULL OR ED_DT IS NULL) ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN UP_DT IS NOT NULL THEN UP_DT ELSE CRET_DT END DESC, NEWS_DAT_SEQ DESC

SELECT NEWS_DAT_SEQ, NEWS_DAT_SUBJECT, STAT_VAL, NEWS_DAT_IMG, IMG_DESC, NEWS_DAT_SBST, NEWS_DAT_HIT_CNT, LINK_URL_ADR, NOTI_YN, CRET_ID, AMD_ID, CRET_DT, AMD_DT, LINK_TARGET, NEWS_LINE_SBST, PRE_SEQ, PRE_SUBJECT, PRE_DT, NEXT_SEQ, NEXT_SUBJECT, NEXT_DT FROM ( SELECT NEWS_DAT_SEQ, NEWS_DAT_SUBJECT, STAT_VAL, NEWS_DAT_IMG, IMG_DESC, NEWS_DAT_SBST, NEWS_DAT_HIT_CNT, LINK_URL_ADR, NOTI_YN, CRET_ID, AMD_ID, CRET_DT, AMD_DT, LINK_TARGET, NEWS_LINE_SBST, '' as PRE_SEQ, '' as PRE_SUBJECT, '' as PRE_DT, '' as NEXT_SEQ, '' as NEXT_SUBJECT, '' as NEXT_DT FROM NMCP_NEWS_DATA_BAS WHERE STAT_VAL = 'Y' )
AND NEWS_DAT_SEQ = #{newsDatSeq}
mapper.update: UPDATE NMCP_NEWS_DATA_BAS SET NEWS_DAT_HIT_CNT = NEWS_DAT_HIT_CNT +1 WHERE NEWS_DAT_SEQ = #{newsDatSeq}
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(NEWS_DAT_SEQ) FROM NMCP_NEWS_DATA_BAS WHERE NEWS_DAT_SEQ < #{currentSeq} AND STAT_VAL = 'Y' AND ( (ST_DT IS NOT NULL AND ED_DT IS NOT NULL AND ST_DT <= SYSDATE AND ED_DT >= TRUNC(SYSDATE)) OR (ST_DT IS NULL OR ED_DT IS NULL) )
